title: The Panda Foundry
description: A performance-focused SMP modpack combining Create and Cobblemon, designed for smooth gameplay, automation, exploration, and creative building without the bloat.
body:
# 🐼⚙️ The Panda Foundry

**Forge your world. Train your legends. Build the impossible.**

Welcome to **The Panda Foundry**, a carefully crafted modpack designed for smooth, performance-focused multiplayer gameplay. Built around the powerful combination of Create and Cobblemon, this pack blends automation, exploration, and creativity into a cohesive and immersive experience.

Want to join The Panda Foundry?

play.empyrealpanda.world

Join our discord for the best experience 

---

## ⚙️ Core Features

### 🏭 Create – Industry & Automation

Design and build complex mechanical systems using Create and a curated selection of addons. From simple contraptions to massive automated factories, the Foundry is yours to shape.

### 🐉 Cobblemon – Exploration & Adventure

Explore a living world filled with Pokémon. Catch, train, and battle as you travel across diverse landscapes and discover new locations.

### 🔮 A World of Discovery

With light structure generation and exploration-focused additions, the world feels alive without overwhelming performance. Discover ruins, settlements, and hidden locations as you expand your journey.

### 🧱 Build Without Limits

A selection of decorative mods such as Chipped and Supplementaries provide a wide variety of building options, allowing you to create detailed factories, towns, and bases.

---

## 🚀 Performance First

The Panda Foundry is designed to remain **smooth and accessible**, even on mid-range systems.

Includes a strong performance stack:

* ModernFix
* FerriteCore
* Sodium + extensions
* EntityCulling & CullLeaves

This ensures stable FPS and reduced memory usage compared to larger kitchen-sink packs.

---

## 🎮 Designed for SMP

This pack is built with multiplayer in mind:

* Balanced mod selection (~100 mods)
* Reduced bloat and unnecessary complexity
* Clean progression between automation and exploration
* Server-friendly performance

---

## 🎨 Custom UI & Experience

The Panda Foundry features a custom menu and UI experience to match its theme, creating a cohesive identity from the moment you launch the game.

---

## ⚠️ Early Release

This is an early version of the pack and may receive updates based on testing and feedback.

---

## 🐼 The Foundry Awaits

Whether you're an engineer, an explorer, or a trainer, The Panda Foundry offers a world where everything connects.

Build your machines.
Catch your team.
Shape your world.

**Welcome to The Panda Foundry.**
